sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35631" key="e)nqronismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνθρον-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n35631.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enthroning,</tr_> title of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσόδια</foreign> by Pindar, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
